silver articulated desk lamp with a conical shade and a long metal arm
row of five yellow sticky notes attached to the wall
white wireless keyboard with low-profile keys
black smartphone standing upright
black computer mouse
black pen lying on the desk surface

atomic_facts.fact: The silver desk lamp is positioned above the laptop and the sticky notes.
The iMac is located to the left of the laptop.
The yellow sticky notes are attached to the wall between the two screens.
The white keyboard is placed in front of the iMac.
The smartphone is standing in front of the laptop.

spatial: The large silver iMac is to the left of the silver laptop. The silver desk lamp is above the laptop and the row of yellow sticky notes. The white keyboard is in front of the iMac, and the black smartphone is in front of the laptop.
state_changes: Black smartphone changes position to standing upright.
